column1: # Ambiguous-output-flag WRITE worklist — commands whose output flag (-o/--output/--out/--write/
# output/--replace-input) is an UNGATED valued flag, so `<cmd> <flag> ~/.ssh/authorized_keys`
# auto-approves an arbitrary write (SSH-key / shell-code injection at the default band).
# be listed here (a NEW one fails the build), and every listed entry must STILL be a hole (once gated,
# it fails as stale → remove it: the sweep's fix confirmation). The list only SHRINKS.
# SWEEP: for each row, either GATE it (real writer → add a [command.path_gate] write role, then remove
# the row) or KEEP it (verified format-only, e.g. `findmnt -o` columns — a permanent, annotated row).
